headline: Model efficiency techniques dominated the quarter as quantization broke out while pruning and prompt orchestration cooled.
body: Quantization broke out this quarter even as model pruning and prompt orchestration weakened off elevated ratios, signaling a rotation within the efficiency stack. Open weights advanced sharply: Z.ai's GLM-5.2 shipped as a 753B parameter Mixture of Experts model with a 1 million token context window, topping the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index. Talent moved at the frontier, with Noam Shazeer joining OpenAI and Meta's head of product for its 'AI for work' transformation departing. A cluster of new browser sandboxing entrants (sandboxed iframe, same-origin policy, srcdoc, sandbox attribute) appeared alongside Gaussian splatting and linear inverse problems.

cited_items.title: Meta head of product for 'AI for work' transformation is leaving company
GLM-5.2 is probably the most powerful text-only open weights LLM
